zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Rheinfelden於大約1065年出生在瑞士阿高海音費爾登時，她的父親Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben49歲，母親Adelaide di Savoia16歲。她於1079年與Berthold II von Zähringen在德國巴登-爾特波格布萊斯高結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1111年12月19日在巴登阿赤 洛拉賀洛拉賀享年47歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 布萊斯高-賀史瓦茲瓦爾德桑可特 彼得。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Rheinfelden于大约1065年出生在瑞士阿高海音費爾登时，她的父亲Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben49岁，母亲Adelaide di Savoia16岁。她于1079年与Berthold II von Zähringen在德国巴登-爾特波格布萊斯高结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1111年12月19日在巴登阿赤 洛拉賀洛拉賀享年47岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 布萊斯高-賀史瓦茲瓦爾德桑可特 彼得。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Rheinfelden was born about 1065, in Rheinfelden, Aargau, Switzerland, her father, Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben, was 49 and her mother, Adelaide di Savoia, was 16. She married Berthold II von Zähringen in 1079, in Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 December 1111, in Lörrach, Amt Lörrach, Baden, at the age of 47, and was buried in Sankt Peter, Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Rheinfelden est née environ 1065, à Rheinfelden, Argovie, Suisse, son père, Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Adelaide di Savoia, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Berthold II von Zähringen en 1079, à Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 décembre 1111, à Lörrach, Amt Lörrach, Baden, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschw: Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Rheinfelden um 1065 in Rheinfelden, Aargau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben 49 und ihre Mutter Adelaide di Savoia 16. Sie hat 1079 in Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland Berthold II von Zähringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Dezember 1111 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Lörrach, Amt Lörrach, Baden und wurde in Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Rheinfelden è nata il circa 1065 nel Rheinfelden, Argovia, Svizzera, sua padre, Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Adelaide di Savoia, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Berthold II von Zähringen nel 1079, nel Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 dicembre 1111, nel Lörrach, Amt Lörrach, Baden, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes von Rheinfeldenが約1065年にスイスアールガウルヘインフエルデンで生まれた時，父Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwabenは49歳，母Adelaide di Savoiaは16歳であった。1079年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグブレイスガウでBerthold II von Zähringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1111年12月19日にバデンアムト ルoラチルoラチで47歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグランドクレイス ブレイスガウ-hオチスチワーズワルドサンクト ペターにて埋葬された。

ko.Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschw: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 브레이스가-호크슈워즈월드 산k트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Rheinfelden(이)가 대략 1065년 스위스 아아르가 리인펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide di Savoia(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1079년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 브레이스가에서 Berthold II von Zähringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1111년 12월 19일 바든 아트 o라치 o라치에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 브레이스가-호크슈워즈월드 산k트 피터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Rheinfelden nasceu aproximadamente 1065, em Rheinfelden, Aargau, Suiça, seu pai, Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide di Savoia, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Berthold II von Zähringen em 1079, em Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1111, em Lörrach, Amt Lörrach, Baden, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschw: санкт питир, ландкрис брисгау-хочщварзвалд, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Rheinfelden родилась около 1065 г. в местности раинфелден, ааргау, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide di Savoia, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Berthold II von Zähringen в 1079 г. в местности брисгау, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 декабря 1111 г. в местности лoррэич, амт лoррэич, баден в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности санкт питир, ландкрис брисгау-хочщварзвалд, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes von Rheinfelden nació aproximadamente 1065, en Rheinfelden, Aargau, Suiza, su papá, Rudolf von Rheinfelden Herzog von Schwaben, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Adelaide di Savoia, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Berthold II von Zähringen en 1079, en Breisgau, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1111, en Lörrach, Amt Lörrach, Baden, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Sankt Peter, Landkreis Breisgau-Hochschwarzwald, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
